title: Norwegian Cod Curry
description: A delicious and flavorful Norwegian-inspired curry made with cod and a blend of spices.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger, and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the cod fillets and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Remove the cod from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil.
Add the curry powder and cook for 1-2 minutes, or until fragrant.
Add the tomato paste and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the chicken broth and bring to a simmer.
Return the cod to the skillet and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
If desired, stir in the heavy cream to add a rich and creamy texture.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste, and serve hot.
